g.text: Coverage remained low in both domains
The selector surfaced arithmetic intermediates less often
Separate rank-only banks; this is a descriptive measurement audit, not a behavioral effect.
Hit = an eligible alias reached the post-exclusion top 10 at the final prompt position, in any band layer; all items stay in the denominator.
